title: Default Settings for Displaying Widget Titles in Item Card View
excerpt:

posts.author: JBDenver (Jeff Boivin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I love the Widget Titles for widgets in the Item Card view on Boards. It is very helpful for helping views navigate to the relevant grouping of info for what they need.

However, it seems the Widget Titles are hidden just as often if not more often than they are visible. I know how to edit the Item Card View settings to display or hide the widget titles but I would like a way as a user that I could make the default setting for a board or workspace to always display or hide widget titles for myself at least or ideally for everyone.

As often as I set Item Card view to display widget titles, I come back to the same boards the next week & find them hidden & then I have to re-display them.

I don’t understand why it is an option to even hide the titles. If I didn’t want people to see titles then I just wouldn’t create the title in the first place.
